name: nanobanana-extension
description: Claude Code plugin for Nano Banana image generation models

scripts.build: cd mcp-server && npm run build && cd .. && npx esbuild mcp-server/dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=mcp-server/dist/bundle.cjs
scripts.preflight: npm run clean && npm ci && npm run format && npm run lint || true && npm run build && npm run typecheck
scripts.postinstall: npm run install-deps && npm run build
